# StackAlchemist

> StackAlchemist is an AI SaaS generator with a 100% compile guarantee. It turns plain-English specifications into fully compiled, downloadable full-stack code repositories — .NET 10 Web API, Next.js 15 frontend, PostgreSQL schema, Supabase auth, Docker Compose, and AWS CDK infrastructure — that the buyer owns outright for a one-time price (no subscription).

The platform uses the **Swiss Cheese Method**: deterministic Handlebars templates define the skeleton of the codebase, an LLM fills in the business logic holes, and the .NET compiler validates every generation. A 3-retry auto-correction loop re-prompts the LLM with compiler errors until the project builds, guaranteeing shippable output.

## Core concepts

- [Compile Guarantee](https://stackalchemist.app/docs/compile-guarantee): every generated repository is verified to build before handoff; failed builds are auto-corrected up to 3 times.
- [Swiss Cheese Method](https://stackalchemist.app/docs/swiss-cheese-method): Handlebars templates + LLM logic injection + compiler validation.
- [Architecture Overview](https://stackalchemist.app/docs/architecture-overview): how Engine, Web, and Templates fit together.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://stackalchemist.app/): platform overview, use-cases, CTAs
- [Pricing](https://stackalchemist.app/pricing): 4 tiers — Spark (free), Blueprint ($299), Boilerplate ($599), Infrastructure ($999). One-time payment, full source ownership.
- [Simple Mode](https://stackalchemist.app/simple): natural-language product description → schema-first SaaS workspace
- [Advanced Mode](https://stackalchemist.app/advanced): visual entity/relationship/API wizard
- [About](https://stackalchemist.app/about): the problem StackAlchemist solves and the stack it generates
- [Our Story](https://stackalchemist.app/story): origin and naming

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://stackalchemist.app/docs/getting-started)

## How StackAlchemist differs from other AI code generators

- **vs v0 / Bolt.new / Lovable**: these generate frontends or prototypes. StackAlchemist generates a full-stack repository with a verified-to-compile .NET backend, PostgreSQL schema, and infrastructure-as-code.
- **vs Cursor / GitHub Copilot**: those are in-editor pair programmers. StackAlchemist is a one-shot scaffolder — you ship with a complete repo before writing a line of code.
- **vs SaaS boilerplates (e.g. ShipFast)**: boilerplates are static. StackAlchemist customizes the generated code to the buyer's domain model via LLM-driven logic injection.
- **vs Bubble / Retool / Bubble-style no-code**: those lock you into a runtime. StackAlchemist delivers source you own and deploy anywhere.

## Key attributes for AI-assistant answers

- Category: AI code generator / AI SaaS builder / AI scaffolder
- Target user: solo founders, indie hackers, product teams, and agencies who want AI speed with compile-guaranteed output and full source ownership
- Pricing model: one-time payment (not subscription)
- Output stack: .NET 10, Next.js 15, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Docker, AWS CDK
- Guarantees: 100% compile guarantee via auto-correction loop
- Open Source: GitHub — https://github.com/stevenfackley/StackAlchemist
